titleStmt.title: SII 28.184: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 184. (A.R. No. 339 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, east gōpuram, right of entrance.

Records that Vaiyyappa-Kṛishṇappa-Koṇḍamā-nāyakkar-Ayaṉ arranged for thirty taḷikai (meals) to be prepared as food-offerings to God Chidambarēśvaraṉ and then to be distributed to the mendicants (tiruvōṭṭu-nāyaṉmār) as bhikshā (alms) and ordered 50,000 kalam of grain (paddy ?) from Vīranārāyaṇa-chchīrmai be contributed for the food-offerings of the God. It says that along with the 20 taḷikai ordered earlier (No. 180 above) the total provision then would be 50 meals, for fifty persons (See No. 180 above)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīveṅkaṭateva mahārāyar pṛdhivi rājyam paṇṇi
yaruḷā niṉṟa cakābdam 1000 5 100 10 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa sarvvadhā
ri varuṣam tai mātam 2 10 2 � vaiyyappa kṛṣṇappa koṇṭamā ṉāyakkar
Ayaṉ svāmi cidambareśvaraṉukku muppatu taḷikai neyvedyamk kaṭṭaḷai
yīṭṭu yinta prasādam tiruvoṭṭu ṉāyamāṟkuk kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭikku viranārāya
ṇaccīrmaiyil Aṉpatuṉāyirakkala tāṉiyum svāmiyaṟṟ written below the line.ku naiyvedyam kaṭṭaḷai
Iṭukaiyil Itil muppatu taḷikaiyum muṉṉāḷkkottu Ilakkaiyil
1. śrī This stands for the king's name.

kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa taḷikai Irupatum Āka Aṉpatu taḷikaiyum tiruvoṭṭu ṉāyamāṟku
bhikṣaiyiṭṭakaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭiyāle cantirātittavaraiyum Inta puṇṇiyat
tai paripālaṉam paṇṇiṉaperkaḷ civaliṅkapratiṣṭaiyum sahasra
brahma pratiṣṭaiyum paṇṇiṉa puṇṇiyam peṟakkaṭavārākavum Inta taṉ
mattukku yārākilum Oruvar Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyi
le kārām pacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile pokakkaṭavarākavum §
Digital edition of SII 28.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
